info.title: MEM API
info.description: Workspace ONE UEM MEM REST API

get.description: Given a page index (row index) and page size, it gets the MEM Devices for a particular Organization Group.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specific page number to get. 0 based index.

400.description: {6:User doesn't have access to organization group or organization group not found.

MEMDeviceSearchResult.description: This holds the resultset of MEM-Device search operation.

MEMDevices.description: Gets or sets list of MEM Devices.

MEMDevice.description: Contains information about Email Management Device.

MEMDeviceID.description: Gets or sets mEM Device Identifier.

EASDeviceID.description: Gets or sets eAS Device Identifier.

EmailAddress.description: Gets or sets email Address of the user.

FriendlyName.description: Gets or sets device Friendly Name.

Status.description: Gets or sets status of the email-action commands with Email-Server.

Reason.description: Gets or sets reason which tells why the email-action commands were Blocked or Allowed.

Managed.description:
Gets or sets flag to specify whether device-email is managed or not
Valid values: TRUE, FALSE.

EasDeviceType.description: Gets or sets specifies the EasDeviceType Name.

Platform.description: Gets or sets device Platform, This value will be not null only for Managed Device. For Unmanaged Devices this will be null.

errorCode.description: Gets or sets application error code.

message.description: Gets or sets friendly error message.

activityId.description: Gets or sets transactionId of the request.

links.description: Gets or sets list of hypermedia link.

Href.description: Gets or sets hyper text reference.

Title.description: Gets or sets title of the link.
